variables.headline: On plan. Two watch-items.
variables.subLine: Where the roadmap stands, what shipped, and the risks we're actively managing.
variables.riskText: API vendor rate-limit under review — mitigation in progress, no launch impact expected.
variables.closingLine: Stakeholder demo Thursday 2pm. Full board in the project workspace.
